# terrible_community_general_spectrum_device (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `community` (String) SNMP community used for device discovery. Required when `state=present`.
- `device` (String) IP address of the device. If a hostname is given, it is resolved to the IP address.
- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this data source against
- `landscape` (String) Landscape handle of the SpectroServer to which add or remove the device.
- `url` (String) HTTP, HTTPS URL of the Oneclick server in the form `(http|https\`://host.domain[:port]).
- `url_password` (String) Oneclick user password.
- `url_username` (String) Oneclick user name.

### Optional

- `agentport` (Number) UDP port used for SNMP discovery.
- `state` (String) On `present` creates the device when it does not exist. On `absent` removes the device when it exists.
- `use_proxy` (Boolean) If `false`, it does not use a proxy, even if one is defined in an environment variable on the target hosts.
- `validate_certs` (Boolean) If `false`, SSL certificates are not validated. This should only be used on personally controlled sites using self-signed certificates.
